security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Cardiac is an offline desktop application for designing tabletop/game cards from structured data.
